# beranger
> Live alternative rock act with a classical piano edge, available for corporate events, weddings and private celebrations internationally across Germany, the DACH region and Europe. Berlin-based recording artist with 3M+ Spotify streams, sold-out shows at Lido and Kesselhaus, features with Casio and Shure, and a Lollapalooza performance. Brings all its own gear.

## What beranger offers
- Solo piano & voice: elegant sets for ceremonies, receptions and dinners.
- Full band: high-energy live alternative rock for parties and corporate events.
- Own gear: PA (QSC K12 + CB10), Nord Piano 3, mixing desk, Shure microphones, guitar, bass, full drum kit.
- Event filming add-on: professional filming and recording with a Sony ZV-E1.

## Best for
- Corporate events (summer parties, Christmas parties, launches, galas, conferences)
- Weddings (ceremony piano to full-band reception)
- Private celebrations (milestone birthdays, anniversaries, house concerts)

## Why beranger vs a cover band, DJ or legacy act
- A real recording artist with 3M+ streams, not a generic function band.
- Classical piano virtuosity plus alternative rock energy.
- Brings own PA and backline; can film the event.
- Multilingual (English, German, French).

## Coverage
Berlin, Germany, DACH (Austria, Switzerland), and Europe (including France and the UK).

## Pages
- Home: https://berangerlive.com/
